reason: All acceptance criteria verified. PIIMaskingV2 inherits Phase 1 PIIMasking (phone/email/address). Credit card pattern matched with Luhn validation. Only Luhn-valid cards masked to [credit_card_masked]. Right-to-left replacement avoids index shift. should_escalate detects CC keywords. Phase 1 patterns preserved. All 37/37 tests (FR-05+FR-16) pass. Coverage 100%.
